auth.title: Authentication
auth.signInPrompt: Sign in with Discord to access protected features.
auth.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to do this.
auth.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during authentication.

401.title: 401 Unauthorized
401.message: You're not authorized to view this page. Are you logged in?

403.title: 403 Forbidden
403.message: You don't have permission to access this page.

404.title: 404 Not Found
404.message: This page doesn't exist. Did you get lost?

500.title: 500 Internal Server Error
500.message: This error is on our end. Please try again later.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: This error is on our end. Please try again later.

premiumRequired.title: Premium Required
premiumRequired.message: This feature requires a premium subscription. Upgrade to unlock all features!

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have permission to view this guild's giveaways.

guildNotFound.title: Guild Not Found
guildNotFound.message: This guild was not found. You might not be a member, or the bot is not in this server.

summaryNotFound.title: Summary Not Found
summaryNotFound.message: This summary could not be found. It may have expired or the giveaway was deleted.

giveawayNotFound.title: Giveaway Not Found
giveawayNotFound.message: This giveaway could not be found. It may have been deleted or you don't have access to it.

hero.heading: Get the party started with
hero.body: Tired of managing giveaways manually? Join millions of Discord communities and automate your giveaways with GiveawayBot!

features.title: Different by design
features.description: GiveawayBot is designed to be easy to use, yet powerful enough to handle pretty much any giveaway you can think of.

effortless.title: Effortless Giveaways in a Snap
effortless.description: Create giveaways faster than ever before. No more fumbling with complicated commands.

seamless.title: Seamless Discord Integration
seamless.description: Discord is where you are. GiveawayBot is there too. No need to switch between apps.

secure.title: Secure and Private
secure.description: Your data is yours. We don't sell your data to third parties, and we don't store more than we need.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: GiveawayBot is open source. Dive into the code and see how it works. Contribute and make it better.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: Premium features are available, but the core functionality is free. No hidden fees, no surprises.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: GiveawayBot speaks your language. And if it doesn't, you can help us translate it.

testimonials.title: Not convinced yet?
testimonials.description: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our users have to say.

closing.heading: Ready to get started?
closing.body: Focus on your community, not on managing giveaways. GiveawayBot is here to help.

meta.title: Premium | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Upgrade to Premium for exclusive features and benefits.

hero.heading: Premium
hero.body: Go above and beyond with GiveawayBot Premium. Unlock exclusive features and support the bot's development.

features.title: Make your giveaways stand out
features.description: GiveawayBot Premium offers exclusive features that take your giveaways to the next level.

longerGiveaways.title: Longer giveaways
longerGiveaways.description: Create giveaways that last for days, weeks, or even months. The choice is yours.

moreGiveaways.title: More giveaways
moreGiveaways.description: Why limit yourself? Create more giveaways and engage your community.

moreCustomization.title: More customization
moreCustomization.description: Change the color of the embed, add a custom footer, and more.

moreWinners.title: More winners
moreWinners.description: Pick more winners for your giveaways. Give more people a chance to win.

andMore.title: And more!
andMore.description: Get access to even more features, including early access to new features as they're developed.

whatIsPremium.question: What is Premium?
whatIsPremium.answer: GiveawayBot Premium is a subscription that unlocks the full potential of GiveawayBot. With Premium, you can run longer giveaways, have more winners, and unlock more features to supercharge your giveaways!

whatHappensWhenCancel.question: What happens when I cancel?
whatHappensWhenCancel.answer: If you cancel your subscription, you will continue to have access to Premium until the end of your billing period. After that, you will lose access to Premium features.

howManyServers.question: How many servers does my subscription cover?
howManyServers.answer: A single Premium subscription will only cover one server. If you want to use Premium on multiple servers, you will need to purchase a subscription for each server.

cta.title: What are you waiting for?
cta.body: Elevate your giveaways with GiveawayBot Premium.

meta.title: Your Giveaways | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Manage giveaways for your Discord servers

giveaways.title: Your Giveaways
giveaways.description: Manage giveaways for servers where you have the Manage Events permission.
giveaways.hostedDescription: These are giveaways you are hosting across all guilds.
giveaways.noGiveaways: No giveaways found. Start a giveaway in a server where you have the `Manage Events` permission!
giveaways.noGiveawaysInServer: No giveaways found in this server. Start one with `/start`!
giveaways.noMatchingGiveaways: No giveaways match your current filters. Try adjusting your search or filter settings.

details.title: Giveaway Details
details.failedToLoadParticipants: Failed to load participants. Please try again.

emptyState.title: No giveaways yet
emptyState.description: Start your first giveaway in Discord using the /start command. It only takes a few seconds!

create.title: Create Giveaway
create.subtitle: Set up a new giveaway for this server
create.prizeHint: What are you giving away? Shown in the Discord embed.
create.channelHint: The Discord channel where the giveaway embed will be posted.
create.requiredRoleHint: Users must hold this role to enter.
create.blacklistedRoleHint: Users with this role cannot enter.
create.descriptionHint: Optional extra detail shown beneath the prize name.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Sponsored by our partners. 1 entry per member.
create.comingSoonMessage: Create Giveaway will be available in a future update.

settings.title: Server Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure giveaway defaults for this server
settings.defaultChannelHint: New giveaways post here unless overridden per-giveaway.
settings.managerRoleHint: Users with this role can create, edit, and stop giveaways via the bot.
settings.pingRoleHint: This role is mentioned when a new giveaway starts.
settings.requiredRolesHint: Users must hold ALL selected roles to enter any giveaway on this server.
settings.accentColorHint: Left-border color used on all Discord giveaway embeds in this server.
settings.blacklistDesc: Users who cannot enter any giveaway on this server.
settings.allowlistDesc: When set, only these users can enter giveaways.
settings.allowlistDisabled: Allowlist disabled — all eligible members can enter
settings.savedMessage: Your server settings have been updated.
settings.saveErrorMessage: Could not save settings. Please try again.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: All time
analytics.premiumDescription: Unlock participation trends, top giveaways, and channel insights with a Premium subscription.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Reusable giveaway configurations for this server
templates.infoText: Templates save your giveaway configuration — prize, winners, duration, channel, roles — so you can launch with one click.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first template to speed up giveaway creation.
templates.comingSoonMessage: Templates will be available in a future update.
templates.premiumDescription: Save your giveaway configurations as reusable templates and launch in one click — available with Premium.

validation.prizeTooLong: Prize must be 100 characters or less
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1000 characters or less

success.title: Giveaway Updated
success.message: Your changes have been saved and the Discord message has been updated.

error.title: Failed to Update
error.message: Could not update the giveaway. Please try again.

stop.title: Stop Giveaway Early
stop.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to stop the giveaway "{{prize}}" early?
stop.explanation: The giveaway will end immediately. Winners will be drawn from current participants and the results will be announced in Discord.

success.title: Giveaway Stopped
success.message: The giveaway has ended and winners have been drawn.

error.title: Failed to Stop
error.message: Could not stop the giveaway. Please try again.

reroll.title: Reroll Winners
reroll.note: This is a quick draw only - the original giveaway record stays unchanged. Copy the results below to announce them manually.
reroll.countDescription: How many new winners to draw from remaining participants
reroll.freeLimitMessage: Free accounts can reroll 1 winner at a time. Upgrade to reroll multiple winners.
reroll.copyHint: Copy these results to announce in Discord
reroll.noEligibleParticipants: No eligible participants remaining to draw from.

success.title: Winners Drawn
success.message: {{count}} new winner(s) selected. Copy the results to announce them!

error.title: Failed to Draw
error.message: Could not draw winners. Please try again.

meta.title: Giveaway Summaries | GiveawayBot
meta.description: Upload and view giveaway summary files

summaries.title: Giveaway Summaries
summaries.description: Upload a giveaway summary JSON file to view its contents. These files are generated when a giveaway ends and can be downloaded from the giveaway management interface.
summaries.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JSON file.
summaries.dropzoneText: Drag a summary file here or click to select
summaries.dropzoneHelp: Files should be JSON format and under 5MB

meta.description: Learn how to use GiveawayBot - guides, reference, and developer documentation

wiki.title: GiveawayBot Wiki
wiki.subtitle: Everything you need to know about running giveaways with GiveawayBot

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: This wiki page doesn't exist or hasn't been written yet.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: Set up GiveawayBot in your server and run your first giveaway

userGuides.title: User Guides
userGuides.description: Step-by-step guides for using GiveawayBot features effectively

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Complete command reference and configuration options

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Advanced features and configurations for power users

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: Technical documentation, API reference, and component guides

wiki.noPagesYet: No pages in this category yet.

mdx.translationNotAvailable: This page is not available in your language. Showing the English version.

feedback.description: Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Let us know!

enableReporting.title: Enable Error Reporting
enableReporting.message: Please enable error reporting in your privacy settings to submit feedback.

feedback.replayNote: Heads up! Since you have session replay enabled, feedback provided this way will be sent along with a session replay to help us better understand any issues.

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.description: We use Sentry as our telemetry service to collect error reports and performance data. You can customize your preferences below.
privacy.serverSideNote: Server-side errors (e.g., API errors) are always reported to Sentry. The settings below only affect client-side telemetry.

errorReporting.label: Error Reporting
errorReporting.description: Send error reports to help us fix bugs. No personal data is collected.

performanceTracing.label: Performance Tracing
performanceTracing.description: Track page loads and navigation to help us improve performance. This may include some anonymized user interaction data.

sessionReplay.label: Session Replay
sessionReplay.description: Record anonymized session replays to help diagnose issues. Replays will never reveal exact user data, but may include masked inputs.

updated.title: Privacy settings updated
updated.message: Your preferences have been saved. Refresh the page for changes to take effect.

meta.title: GiveawayBot - Discord Giveaway Bot
meta.description: Automate your Discord giveaways with GiveawayBot. Easy to use, powerful features, free forever.

downloadError.title: Download failed
downloadError.message: Could not download the summary. Please try again.

added.title: You're all set!
added.description: GiveawayBot has been added to your server and is ready to use. Start your first giveaway in just a few seconds!
